stemHtml: A sailplane flying in VMC conditions is approaching a light aeroplane towing an object at approximately the same altitude and on a converging course. Which aircraft has the right of way?

options.a: The sailplane, if the aeroplane is on its left side.
options.b: The aeroplane towing an object, regardless of its position in relation to the sailplane.
options.c: The sailplane, regardless of its position in relation to the aeroplane.
options.d: The aeroplane towing an object, if the sailplane is on its right side.
